CustomField.description: API name of the source OpportunityLineItem field to copy FROM (e.g. Revenue_Type__c). Must be queryable on OpportunityLineItem; an unknown name fails the dynamic SOQL in COPY_QuoteLineItemTriggerHandler.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: API name of the OpportunityLineItem field to copy from.
CustomField.label: Opportunity Line Item Field
